title: OptimizerMetricsChart regression: lines and chart layers disappear after recent axis/tick styling
description:
## Problem
Optimizer metrics chart appears blank after initial render; users only see legend squares.

## Behavior Spec
Feature: Optimizer metrics chart remains visible after render
Scenario: Render optimizer chart with cycle series
Given chart has alignment/accuracy series data
When chart mounts and subsequent layout updates occur
Then lines, labels, and background layers remain visible
And legend remains visible
And chart does not collapse to blank state.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started investigation. Reproducing chart regression in OptimizerMetricsChart and isolating whether axis/tick changes are clipping or zeroing rendered series after mount.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Root-caused to recent OptimizerMetricsChart polish changes (ResizeObserver-driven tick rotation + axis label props). Applied targeted rollback of those additions to restore stable line/chart rendering while keeping Overall/Recent/Regression behavior intact. Verified with Jest: OptimizerMetricsChart + ProcedureTask optimizer tests pass.
